name: debug-log-capture
description: Captures debug console output to log files and exposes them via MCP for AI assistants like Claude Code.

commands.title: Debug Log Capture: Open Current Log
Debug Log Capture: Clean All Logs
Debug Log Capture: Start MCP Server
Debug Log Capture: Stop MCP Server
Debug Log Capture: Configure Claude Code MCP
Debug Log Capture: Configure GitHub Copilot MCP

debugLogCapture.logDirectory.description: Directory (relative to workspace root) where debug log files are stored.

debugLogCapture.cleanOnStart.description: Delete previous log files when a new debug session starts.

debugLogCapture.maxLogSizeMB.description: Maximum log file size in MB. Older lines are trimmed when exceeded.

debugLogCapture.mcpServer.autoStart.description: Automatically start the MCP server when the extension activates.

debugLogCapture.mcpServer.port.description: Port for the MCP SSE server.

debugLogCapture.includeTimestamps.description: Prefix each log line with a timestamp.

debugLogCapture.excludeCategories.description: DAP output categories to suppress from log files. Possible values: stdout, stderr, console, important, telemetry.

scripts.compile: npm run typecheck && npm run build
